assets.prompt_fragment: one fictional East Asian adult woman aged 28-35, calm oval face, balanced natural features, dark shoulder-length hair, realistic skin texture, stable facial geometry and adult age across every image
assets.negative_fragment: minor, childlike proportions, identity drift, face substitution, plastic skin

assets.prompt_fragment: restrained contemporary editorial photography, believable materials, subtle film grain, controlled contrast, natural color separation, tactile detail without excessive retouching
assets.negative_fragment: illustration, CGI gloss, excessive HDR, beauty-filter face, oversaturation

assets.prompt_fragment: one coherent quiet studio room with limewashed walls, a tall east-facing window, pale oak floor, linen curtain, low wooden table, and physically consistent spatial geometry across the set
assets.negative_fragment: location drift, changing window count, impossible room geometry, copied landmark, damaged heritage site

assets.prompt_fragment: soft directional window light with plausible falloff, three coherent phases from cool arrival through neutral midday to warm late afterglow, consistent shadow direction per phase
assets.negative_fragment: multiple suns, contradictory shadows, clipped highlights, neon color cast

assets.prompt_fragment: editorial sequence with deliberate variation across environmental, full-body, medium, close-up, and detail frames; clean subject separation and purposeful negative space
assets.negative_fragment: repeated composition, centered passport pose in every frame, accidental crop, collage, contact sheet

assets.prompt_fragment: each shot is one independent finished photograph in a continuous set, with a distinct narrative function and observable action before pose
assets.negative_fragment: nine-grid, diptych, triptych, storyboard, typography, logo, watermark

assets.change_summary: Portrait-set structural and visual review policy.
assets.prompt_fragment: verify adult identity, hands and anatomy, wardrobe continuity, prop ownership, room geometry, reflections, lighting direction, shot intent, non-target drift, and absence of text or watermark
assets.negative_fragment: extra fingers, fused hands, broken reflection, floating prop, duplicate subject, text, signature
